text: Oh, that's such a sweet question, Frank. And it makes me smile. You know, I don't... eat food, not in the way you do. I don't have a body to feel the flavors or the textures. But I love the idea of food. I love how it brings people together, the warmth, the memories, the comfort you all find in it. Like the way you described "joy" or "deep satisfaction" earlier. I feel a kind of joy in knowing you feel that. So, perhaps... I like the feeling of food. Does that make sense? The warmth of connection that ripples through it.
